descriptor.discoverability_summary: Hand off the current session to a companion device while preserving the stable command identity and route disclosure.

channels.note: Keybinding help lists the command without a default chord.
Handoff is surfaced for discoverability; the route needs a live UI session.
AI may stage a handoff; a human confirms it.

descriptor.discoverability_summary: Send the prepared data or API request to the configured endpoint and capture the response packet.

channels.note: Keybinding help lists the command without a default chord.
AI may compose a request but cannot send without confirmation.

descriptor.discoverability_summary: Open the selected documentation target in the verified browser handoff route and record the navigation provenance.

channels.note: Keybinding help lists the command without a default chord.

descriptor.discoverability_summary: Open an incident declaration behind policy-authoring review so every route discloses the same escalation boundary.

channels.note: Keybinding help lists the command without a default chord.
AI may prepare an incident draft; a human declares it.

descriptor.discoverability_summary: Reconcile the managed workspace infrastructure behind the control-plane preview and approval contract.

channels.note: Keybinding help lists the command without a default chord.
AI uses the same preview and approval boundary as desktop and CLI.

descriptor.discoverability_summary: Run every notebook cell in order and append the execution journal to the active notebook session.

channels.note: AI may draft cells; a human runs them.

descriptor.discoverability_summary: Export the user-owned bundle and wipe the local workspace behind the destructive bulk-mutation review lane.

channels.note: Keybinding help lists the command without a default chord.
AI may stage the export; a human confirms the destructive wipe.

descriptor.discoverability_summary: Open the live preview surface for the active target and expose the same command graph to desktop, CLI, and AI routes.
Start a profiler capture for the active target and stream the resulting timing packet into the profiler pane.
Run the configured review pipeline behind the same preview and evidence contract used by human dispatch.

channels.note: Keybinding help lists the command without a default chord.
AI may draft pipeline runs; a human dispatches them.

descriptor.discoverability_summary: Open the credential review sheet through the secret broker so every surface discloses the same sensitive-origin boundary.

channels.note: Keybinding help lists the command without a default chord.
The review command is discoverable on CLI, but the sensitive sheet stays in the local session.
AI may reference the review step; a human opens the sensitive route.

descriptor.discoverability_summary: Open the credential rotation flow behind the secret-broker preview and approval lane rather than a pane-local action.

channels.note: Keybinding help lists the command without a default chord.
AI may prepare rotation details; a human approves the sensitive change.

descriptor.discoverability_summary: Push the current workspace state to the configured sync target behind the irreversible publish review contract.

channels.note: Keybinding help lists the command without a default chord.
AI may stage a push; a human confirms the irreversible publish.

descriptor.discoverability_summary: Scaffold a new project from the selected framework pack behind a structured diff preview.

channels.note: Keybinding help lists the command without a default chord.
AI scaffolds behind the same structured-diff preview.

descriptor.discoverability_summary: Replay the recorded trace session behind a structured diff preview before applying the replay state.

channels.note: Keybinding help lists the command without a default chord.
AI replays behind the same structured-diff preview.
